prestazioni: Replace the original 2.6L Lagonda LB6 inline-6 engine with a fully built 3.0L LB6 stroker kit featuring forged Mahle pistons (87.5mm bore, 83mm stroke), Cunningham con-rods, and a billet crankshaft from RND Engineering. Pair with a custom camshaft profile by Kent Cams (280° duration, 0.450" lift) and a Weber 45DCOE dual-throttle-body conversion with velocity stacks by ITG.

Install a bespoke forced-induction system using a Rotrex C38-91 supercharger (12psi boost) mounted via a custom billet aluminum intake manifold by JE Motorsport, paired with a custom intercooler setup (air-to-water) by PWR and a custom fuel system upgrade with Bosch 044 fuel pumps and ID1000 injectors.

Upgrade the original 4-speed David Brown gearbox to a close-ratio 5-speed Tremec TKO-600 with a custom bellhousing adapter by Quaife, paired with a limited-slip differential (Quaife ATB) and a custom driveshaft by GKN Driveline. Suspension overhaul includes custom-valved Öhlins DFV coilovers with adjustable camber plates and poly-bushed control arms by SuperPro.
estetica: Replace the original aluminum body panels with lightweight carbon fiber replicas by Fibre Classic (UK), including a custom front splitter, side skirts, and a ducktail spoiler, all finished in Aston Martin Racing Green (code: RAL 6001).

Install a custom interior with full Alcantara upholstery by Royal Steering Wheels, featuring a MOMO Prototipo 350mm steering wheel, custom gauge pods by Smiths (replica 1950s design with modern internals), and a bespoke roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, bolt-in).

Upgrade the lighting to modern Hella Rallye 2000 headlights with custom Cibié Oscar LED bulbs, paired with Marchal 150 fog lights and a custom rear light setup using Lucas LED units housed in original-style chrome bezels by Classic Car LEDs.
